details.test: Task 1: Cheapest .com under $15 for 2 years added to cart
Task 2: Bulk search add all qualifying .com/.net domains under $12 to cart
Task 3: Submit $750 purchase inquiry for parked domain
Task 4: Subscribe to weekly domain deal alerts for .com, .net, .io
Task 5: Switch to Spanish/EUR and add a domain under €20 to cart
Task 6: Open low-cost starter/basic hosting offer (<= $5) and view plan details
Task 7: Contact domain owner via WHOIS contact form
Task 8: Apply promo code PARKED20 to cart with domain over $10
Task 9: Select cheapest privacy option including email forwarding
